title: A Michelin-Inspired British Columbia Coastal Road Trip
theme: Beaches, rainforest, rugged Pacific coast, and a polished culinary finish in Vancouver.

days.title: Crossing Into Island Time
days.summary: Cross into Canada, take the ferry to Vancouver Island, and begin the trip at an intentionally slower pace beside Rathtrevor Beach.
activities: Drive from Bellingham to the Tsawwassen ferry terminal
Sail from Tsawwassen to Duke Point
Check in at Tigh-Na-Mara Seaside Spa Resort
Book a spa treatment or cedar barrel experience

dining.approach: Keep dinner relaxed after the travel day and save the tasting-menu experiences for later in the trip.

days.title: Across the Island to the Pacific
days.route: Parksville → Cathedral Grove → Pacific Rim → Ucluelet
days.summary: Follow Highway 4 from Vancouver Island's eastern shore through waterfalls, old-growth forest, lakes, and mountains to the open Pacific.
stops: BC Hydro fast-charging hub at Save-On-Foods in Port Alberni
activities: Walk a section of the Wild Pacific Trail before dinner
days.pace: Scenic drive with several short stops

days.title: A Slow Ucluelet Morning, City Lights
days.route: Ucluelet → Departure Bay → Horseshoe Bay → Vancouver
days.summary: Enjoy breakfast and a slow final morning in Ucluelet, drive to Nanaimo for the ferry, and finish the trip with a Michelin-starred dinner in Vancouver.
morning: Breakfast in the room or on the private balcony at Pluvio Restaurant + Rooms
Optional short harbour walk or relaxed time in Ucluelet
Check out and collect food for the drive

breakfast.service: Prepared by the Pluvio team and placed in the room refrigerator before arrival

lunch.approach: Pick up food in Ucluelet for the drive or stop in Port Alberni, depending on road timing.
lunch.note: Keep lunch flexible so the 4:00 p.m. ferry remains protected.

schedule.activity: Enjoy the included Pluvio breakfast in the room or on the private balcony
Optional short harbour walk or relaxed time in Ucluelet
Check out and pick up food for the drive
Charge at Electrify Canada, 4585 Uplands Drive, targeting 55–65% before the ferry
Arrive and check in at Departure Bay terminal
BC Ferries sailing from Departure Bay to Horseshoe Bay
Arrive at Horseshoe Bay, subject to the published sailing schedule
Check in at the Loden Hotel

travel: Take the 4:00 p.m. sailing from Departure Bay to Horseshoe Bay
Continue to the Loden Hotel in Vancouver

dinner.note: Published on Main and the listed alternatives currently hold one Michelin star in the Michelin Guide Vancouver 2025. Recheck the current guide before booking.

days.pace: Comfortable travel day; depart Ucluelet by 11:00 a.m. to protect the ferry reservation
timingNotes: Pluvio estimates the normal drive from Ucluelet to Nanaimo at about two and a half hours, but Highway 4 is winding and delays are possible.
BC Ferries advises booked vehicle passengers to check in 45–60 minutes before departure.
Confirm that a 4:00 p.m. sailing is offered on the exact travel date before finalizing this schedule.

days.title: A Slow Vancouver Morning
days.summary: Sleep in, enjoy a final waterfront walk and breakfast, then make the drive home to Bellingham.
activities: Walk the seawall through Coal Harbour or Stanley Park

reservations.note: Reserve the vehicle crossing in advance.

reservations.item: BC Ferries: Departure Bay → Horseshoe Bay
reservations.note: Reserve the vehicle crossing in advance.
Reserve both the room and tasting menu; seating is limited.
Published on Main is the first choice; book as soon as the trip dates are fixed.

planningNotes: Confirm exact travel dates before adding ferry departure times or restaurant hours.
Day 3 is anchored by a target 4:00 p.m. Departure Bay sailing; leave Ucluelet by 11:00 a.m. and arrive at the terminal by 3:00–3:15 p.m.
Recheck seasonal road conditions, operating hours, and Michelin distinctions shortly before booking.

vehicle.planningNote: Uses the more conservative EPA configuration for the 2023 Touring. Actual range varies with wheels, temperature, speed, elevation, weather, and battery condition.

plannedStops.name: Save-On-Foods Port Alberni charging hub
plannedStops.timing: After Cathedral Grove and before continuing west toward Sproat Lake and Ucluelet
plannedStops.reason: Provides a deliberate DC fast-charge before the remote Highway 4 segment and avoids relying on any charging at Pluvio. This is the strongest well-documented multi-port fast-charging hub directly on the Day 2 route.

plannedStops.name: Canadian Tire Nanaimo
plannedStops.timing: Before checking in for the 4:00 p.m. Departure Bay ferry
plannedStops.reason: Provides ample reserve for Horseshoe Bay, Vancouver, and hotel arrival while using the trip's preferred high-power network.

plannedStops.name: Loden Hotel EV Power-Up Stations
plannedStops.reason: Complimentary hotel charging eliminates the need for a Day 4 fast-charging stop.

contingencies.trigger: If the 180 kW Save-On-Foods hub is unavailable, use the two 50 kW BC Hydro chargers at 3455 Johnston Road before continuing to Ucluelet.
contingencies.note: Check live charger status in the Lucid, BC Hydro EV, or PlugShare app before leaving Parksville. Do not continue west unless the vehicle predicts a comfortable Ucluelet arrival and at least 15% at the next planned charger.

contingencies.name: BC Hydro Rock City Centre
contingencies.trigger: Use if the Electrify Canada site is unavailable or congested.
contingencies.note: The site includes high-power CCS equipment but is outside the preferred Electrify network.

operatingGuidance: Navigate to the charging station in the Lucid so the battery can precondition before arrival.
Use a 350 kW dispenser when available; the 2023 Air Touring will request only the power it can accept.
Check live station status and the vehicle's predicted arrival state of charge before each Highway 4 leg.
No charging at Pluvio is assumed or required by this plan.
Do not rely on estimated percentages when road, weather, or charger conditions differ from the plan.
